meaning: n.(按钮式弹簧开启的)弹簧小折刀(亦作switchblade knife)
examples: Don't be a switchblade. Normally the switchblade is thought of a backstabber, often taking credit for someone else's work.
Enter the Switchblade, a flying motorcycle that Northern California engineering firm Samson Motorworks hopes to have on the road and in the sky by next year.
The Razer DeathStalker maintains a standard keyboard layout, replacing the Switchblade UI with a numpad instead.
Called Switchblade, it is about the same size as Wasp and operates on the same handheld controller.
